payload.text:
**Analyzing date and timezone handling issues**

I'm exploring how date and time zones affect the FuturePledgeDate handling, especially with differences like DST and non-DST zones causing day shifts. I want to ensure dates are treated as date-only strings and formatted consistently in the account's timezone to avoid off-by-one-day errors across users in different zones. I'll check how date parsing, comparison, and formatting are done, especially in FormDateTimeControl and related components.

payload.text:
**Analyzing timezone and DST date shifts**

I'm examining how storing and displaying futurePledgeDate at local midnight, combined with non-DST account timezones and DST viewer timezones, can cause day shifts in displayed dates. The key seems to be showing and comparing dates using the account's timezone rather than the viewer's local timezone. I'll look into passing the account timezone to relevant components and using date-fns-tz utilities to handle this consistently across the app.

summary.text:
**Analyzing timezone and DST date shifts**

I'm examining how storing and displaying futurePledgeDate at local midnight, combined with non-DST account timezones and DST viewer timezones, can cause day shifts in displayed dates. The key seems to be showing and comparing dates using the account's timezone rather than the viewer's local timezone. I'll look into passing the account timezone to relevant components and using date-fns-tz utilities to handle this consistently across the app.

payload.message:
Made future pledge date rendering timezone-aware by formatting in the account’s time zone everywhere it’s displayed (banner + submit confirmation), and threaded `timeZone` through the public page, builder preview, and embedded builder components so DST differences no longer shift the day. I also widened `futurePledgeDate` to `Date | string` and stopped converting Date values to ISO in previews to avoid implicit timezone shifts.

Details
- Added `formatDateInTimeZone` to centralize timezone-safe formatting in `src/ui/utils/formatDate/formatDate.ts`.
- Updated future pledge banner + submit button to use timezone-safe formatting and accept `Date | string`: `src/ui/components/organisms/Funds/DonationSelector/FuturePledgeBanner.tsx`, `src/ui/components/organisms/ActionPages/ActionPageSubmitButton/ActionPageSubmitButton.tsx`, `src/builder/PublicActionPage/components/DonationSelector/components/FuturePledgeBanner/FuturePledgeBanner.tsx`, `src/builder/PublicActionPage/components/ActionPageSubmitButton/ActionPageSubmitButton.tsx`.
- Passed `timeZone` down from action page/account and builder preview contexts: `src/pages/ActionPages/pages/PublicActionPage/ActionPageView/ActionPageLayout/ActionPageBody/ActionPageFinanceBlock/ActionPageFinanceBlock.tsx`, `src/pages/ActionPages/pages/PublicActionPage/ActionPageView/ActionPageLayout/ActionPageBody/ActionPagePaymentBlock/ActionPagePaymentBlock.tsx`, `src/builder/PublicActionPage/ActionPageView/ActionPageLayout/ActionPageBody/ActionPageFinanceBlock/ActionPageFinanceBlock.tsx`, `src/builder/PublicActionPage/ActionPageView/ActionPageLayout/ActionPageBody/ActionPagePaymentBlock/ActionPagePaymentBlock.tsx`, `src/pages/ActionPages/pages/ActionPagesBuilder/components/Preview/FinanceBlockPreview/FinanceBlockPreview.tsx`, `src/pages/ActionPages/pages/ActionPagesBuilder/components/Preview/LivePreview/LiveFinancePreview/LiveFinancePreview.tsx`, `src/pages/ActionPages/pages/ActionPagesBuilder/components/Preview/FormBlockPreview/FormBlockPreview.tsx`.

content.text:
Made future pledge date rendering timezone-aware by formatting in the account’s time zone everywhere it’s displayed (banner + submit confirmation), and threaded `timeZone` through the public page, builder preview, and embedded builder components so DST differences no longer shift the day. I also widened `futurePledgeDate` to `Date | string` and stopped converting Date values to ISO in previews to avoid implicit timezone shifts.

Details
- Added `formatDateInTimeZone` to centralize timezone-safe formatting in `src/ui/utils/formatDate/formatDate.ts`.
- Updated future pledge banner + submit button to use timezone-safe formatting and accept `Date | string`: `src/ui/components/organisms/Funds/DonationSelector/FuturePledgeBanner.tsx`, `src/ui/components/organisms/ActionPages/ActionPageSubmitButton/ActionPageSubmitButton.tsx`, `src/builder/PublicActionPage/components/DonationSelector/components/FuturePledgeBanner/FuturePledgeBanner.tsx`, `src/builder/PublicActionPage/components/ActionPageSubmitButton/ActionPageSubmitButton.tsx`.
- Passed `timeZone` down from action page/account and builder preview contexts: `src/pages/ActionPages/pages/PublicActionPage/ActionPageView/ActionPageLayout/ActionPageBody/ActionPageFinanceBlock/ActionPageFinanceBlock.tsx`, `src/pages/ActionPages/pages/PublicActionPage/ActionPageView/ActionPageLayout/ActionPageBody/ActionPagePaymentBlock/ActionPagePaymentBlock.tsx`, `src/builder/PublicActionPage/ActionPageView/ActionPageLayout/ActionPageBody/ActionPageFinanceBlock/ActionPageFinanceBlock.tsx`, `src/builder/PublicActionPage/ActionPageView/ActionPageLayout/ActionPageBody/ActionPagePaymentBlock/ActionPagePaymentBlock.tsx`, `src/pages/ActionPages/pages/ActionPagesBuilder/components/Preview/FinanceBlockPreview/FinanceBlockPreview.tsx`, `src/pages/ActionPages/pages/ActionPagesBuilder/components/Preview/LivePreview/LiveFinancePreview/LiveFinancePreview.tsx`, `src/pages/ActionPages/pages/ActionPagesBuilder/components/Preview/FormBlockPreview/FormBlockPreview.tsx`.
- Allowed `futurePledgeDate` to be `Date | string` in donation selectors to avoid lossy ISO conversion in previews: `src/ui/components/organisms/Funds/DonationSelector/DonationSelector.tsx`, `src/builder/PublicActionPage/components/DonationSelector/DonationSelector.tsx`.

No tests run.

If you want, I can:
1) Add a small unit test around `formatDateInTimeZone` for a non-DST timezone vs DST timezone.
2) Validate the UI manually in the builder preview and public action page with `America/Phoenix` and `America/Los_Angeles` account time zones.

Added a DST vs non-DST timezone test to the existing `formatDate` test suite so it can be run in Node and verify consistent formatting for Phoenix (no DST) and Los Angeles (DST) on the DST boundary date. See `src/ui/utils/formatDate/formatDate.test.ts`.

If you want to run just that test:
1) `yarn vitest src/ui/utils/formatDate/formatDate.test.ts`
